/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/xr-workspace.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/xr-workspace.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/xr-workspace.dir/gen/wlr-layer-shell-unstable-v1-client.c.o" "CMakeFiles/xr-workspace.dir/gen/xdg-output-unstable-v1-client.c.o" -o xr-workspace  -lwayland-client -lm -lwayland-egl -lwayland-client -lm -lEGL -lGLESv2 -lm -lwayland-client -lwayland-egl -lEGL -lGLESv2
